name: hoc/confirm-dialog
description: A reusable confirmation-dialog HOC built on top of AlertDialog that standardizes title, description, confirm/cancel button labels, and destructive-state styling. Exposes an imperative show/hide API (or declarative open prop) so any component can trigger a confirmation without duplicating modal markup. Composed of AlertDialog primitives, Button variants, and locale-aware labels via ConfigProvider.
useCases: Delete confirmations before removing a user, file, or database record from a list
Publish confirmations in CMS workflows that warn about irreversible public visibility
Bulk-action confirmations when a user selects multiple items and clicks 'Archive' or 'Delete'
Unsaved-changes prompts when navigating away from a form with dirty state
